steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$\left|x-2\right|=9$$Graph or solve it directly and read the x-value that works. The requested value is $11$.

steps.title: Recognize the two cases from the absolute value
steps.content: For $|x-2| = 9$, the absolute value definition tells us that either $x - 2 = 9$ or $x - 2 = -9$.

steps.title: Solve both cases
steps.content:
Case 1: If $x - 2 = 9$, then
$$x = 11$$Case 2: If $x - 2 = -9$, then
$$x = -7$$
Since the problem asks for one possible solution, 11 is a valid answer.
